{{Quote|Star Tours is proud to introduce the StarSpeeder 3000. The most advanced transport of its kind in existence. With high-speed warp drive and a travel range of over one billion lightyears, the 3000 makes touring the galaxy safe and comfortable.|A Star Tours announcer|<ref name="ST" />}}
The '''StarSpeeder 3000''' was a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Starship/Legends|spacecraft]] used by the [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] travel agency. It had room to carry up to 40 passengers. The craft were produced sometime around [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], when Star Tours referred to them as "new."<ref name="ST" />

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|What's this, do my sensors deceive me? Or are there really passengers out there? Gee, I hope the new StarSpeeders run better then the one that brought me here. What a bucket of bolts! You'd never get me on one of those things again in a billion lightyears.|[[G2-4T]]|<ref name="ST" />}}
[[File:Starspeeder_3000_specifications.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Technical specifications for the ''StarSpeeder 3000'']]
The StarSpeeder 3000s were very similar in to their predecessors, the [[StarSpeeder 1000]]s, both in shape and equipment. The craft was still boxy, with a downwardly angled front side, and still featured the usual five automated doors on both starboard and portside. With its five seating rows, the 3000 could still be boarded by no more than forty passengers at a time. Like with the StarSpeeder 1000, an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] was loaded in a [[Astromech socket/Legends|socket]] at the bow of the ship.<ref name="ST" /> Unlike the StarSpeeder 1000, however, the StarSpeeder 3000 lacked several features such as the [[IC-360 camera droid]] and multi-terrain skids.

Those transports were normally piloted by an [[RX-series pilot droid/Legends|RX-Series]] [[Pilot droid/Legends|pilot droid]], assisted by its astromech droid navigator. The ship was considered fast and maneuverable for a transport. Given the lowered risk usually involved in interplanetary tourism, the StarSpeeder 3000 was equipped only with minimal [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]] and two simple [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], the latter of which were nevertheless as abnormally powerful as the concealed cannons on the StarSpeeder 1000, being able to destroy a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighter]] with a single shot. However, the tour brochure indicated that the [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], or "warp drive," was fairly advanced. Despite the agency's claim that the ships themselves were highly advanced, they were often in need of repair.<ref name="ST" />

==History==
[[File:StarToursGamer9.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A StarSpeeder 3000 on Endor]]
The StarSpeeders were used by Star Tours starting around 4 ABY, and eventually used during their push to capitalize on the new found notoriety of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] at the time with the [[Endor Express]] route. After a series of mishaps in the months following, including a StarSpeeder's accidental involvement in a [[Battle of Death Star III|space battle]], the tour company shut down.<ref name="ST" /><ref name="Gamer9">{{GamerCite|9|Endor and the Moddell Sector}}</ref>

The vessels were used for years afterward by other entities, including [[Corellian Translines]] in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]].<ref name="Two" /> Some remained in service as late [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], when many could be seen operating around the planet [[Di'wor]].<ref name="SOP">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
"[[MemoryAlpha:Warp drive|Warp drive]]" is the primary means of propulsion for vehicles in [[Memoryalpha:Star Trek|''Star Trek'']]. Many early ''Star Wars'' tie-in media products mistakenly used this term for the faster-than-light drives of ''Star Wars'' ships, which are properly known as "hyperdrives."

With the launch of the new ''[[Star Tours: The Adventures Continue]]'' attraction at three Disney Parks, passengers ride a new starship. The new ship, called the [[StarSpeeder 1000]], is white with an orange pinstripe, while the StarSpeeder 3000 is white with a blue pinstripe.<ref name="EndorExpress.Net">{{EndorExpress|url=database/starships/starspeeder-1000|text=StarSpeeder 1000}}</ref>

While sources state the 1000 was manufactured by [[Sacul Aerospace]], there is no such information about the similarly designed 3000.
